cc-triage — Skill-Feature Gap Explorer

Issue #1964 · scripts/cc-triage.mjs → shared/cc-skill-gaps.json

After feature extraction, computeSkillGaps() flags a skill only when its compatibility: floor is strictly below the CC version that introduced a new-surface feature mapped to it. Set the inputs and watch the decision — and the exact cc-skill-gaps.json row it would emit.

Inputs

yes no / unknown skill

Decision path

cc-skill-gaps.json row


      

    

  


  

    Self-contained — no network. Mirrors the real computeSkillGaps() +
    compareSemver() logic. Sibling cc-triage playgrounds:
    skip-below-floor,
    opus-alias.
